[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / cellColor

# Method: cellColor()

## Call Signature

```ts
cellColor(): TextmodeColor;
```

Current cell background color.

### Returns

[`TextmodeColor`](../../../namespaces/color/classes/TextmodeColor.md)

Current cell color.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="cellColor" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

## Call Signature

```ts
cellColor(gray, alpha?): void;
```

Set the cell background color using a grayscale value.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `gray` | `number` | Grayscale value (0-255) |
| `alpha?` | `number` | Optional alpha value (0-255) |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="cellColor" encoded-code="" />

## Call Signature

```ts
cellColor(
   r, 
   g, 
   b, 
   a?): void;
```

Set the cell background color using RGB(A) values.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `r` | `number` | Red component (0-255) |
| `g` | `number` | Green component (0-255) |
| `b` | `number` | Blue component (0-255) |
| `a?` | `number` | Optional alpha component (0-255) |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="cellColor" encoded-code="_ICcjMTQzODVmJyA6ICcjMzAxODIwJyk7Cgl0LmNoYXJDb2xvcigyNDAsIDI0NSwgMjU1KTsKCXQucmVjdCgxMCwgNSk7Cn0pOwoKbGFiZWxMYXllci5kcmF3KCgpID0-_ICdIRVg6IEJMVUUnIDogJ0hFWDogUkVEJywgeCwgeSsrLCAxNDAsIDI1NSwgMTgwKTsKfSk7Cgp0LndpbmRvd1Jlc2l6ZWQoKCkgPT4gewoJdC5yZXNpemVDYW52YXMod2luZG93LmlubmVyV2lkdGgsIHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lckhlaWdodCk7Cn0pOw" />

## Call Signature

```ts
cellColor(value): void;
```

Set the cell background color using a CSS string or TextmodeColor object.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | \| `string` \| [`TextmodeColor`](../../../namespaces/color/classes/TextmodeColor.md) | Hex string, `rgb()`/`rgba()` string, or an existing color object |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="cellColor" encoded-code="" />
